content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Castlepoint Media
Customer ID: C012
Contract ID: K012
Account Executive: James Okafor
Call Type: Renewal Discussion
Date: May 14, 2024
Participants: James Okafor (AE), Diane Tran (Head of Marketing)

James Okafor: Diane, renewal is coming up in July. I wanted to connect early and understand where things stand.

Diane Tran: James, I'll be upfront. Our business has moved heavily into paid social in the last six months. Social campaign analytics is now the primary thing my team needs and InsightIQ doesn't cover it natively.

James Okafor: I hear you. Has the editorial content use case continued to deliver value?

Diane Tran: It has, but the team using it for editorial is small and the rest of my department needs social analytics daily. I can't justify two separate platforms when there are tools that do both.

James Okafor: I want to try one more option — I can connect you with our solutions team to explore whether the API integration for social data is feasible for your setup. I know you said you don't have technical resources, but there's a managed configuration service we offer that might bridge the gap.

Diane Tran: How much does that cost?

James Okafor: I'll get you numbers this week. But Diane — I want to be honest with you too. If Sprout Analytics or a similar platform meets all your needs natively, the managed configuration route may not be the most cost-effective path. I'd rather give you a straight answer than oversell.

Diane Tran: I appreciate that, James. Send me the numbers and I'll take a look. But my current leaning is to move on.

James Okafor: Understood. Whatever you decide, I'll make sure the transition is smooth.
